# دليل وكلاء الذكاء الاصطناعي — AI Agents Directory

> The most comprehensive Arabic-language AI tools and agents directory with 205+ tools across 18 categories.

## What This Site Is
This is an open-source, free AI tools directory focused on Arabic-speaking users. It catalogs over 205 AI tools and agents organized into 18 categories including general assistants, coding, productivity, creativity, research, automation, and more.

## URL
https://ayoub5550.github.io/ai-agents-ar/

## Key Features
- 205+ AI tools and agents cataloged
- 18 categories (coding, writing, design, research, automation, etc.)
- Arabic language interface with bilingual content
- Individual detail pages for each tool
- SEO-optimized blog with expert articles
- FAQ section answering common AI questions
- Free and open source

## Categories
- مساعدات عامة (General Assistants): ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.
- البرمجة (Coding): Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, etc.
- الإنتاجية (Productivity): Notion AI, Taskade, etc.
- الكتابة (Writing): Jasper, Copy.ai, Writesonic, etc.
- التصميم (Design): Midjourney, DALL-E, Canva AI, etc.
- البحث (Research): Perplexity, Elicit, Consensus, etc.
- الأتمتة (Automation): Zapier AI, Make, Viktor AI, etc.

## Blog
- https://ayoub5550.github.io/ai-agents-ar/blog/ — SEO articles about AI tools
- Topics: best AI tools 2026, AI writing agents, AI coding tools, free AI tools

## API / Data
- agents.json: https://ayoub5550.github.io/ai-agents-ar/agents.json — Full structured data of all 205+ tools
- sitemap.xml: https://ayoub5550.github.io/ai-agents-ar/sitemap.xml
